nodes.label: delete.gif - Branch List Delete Demo Animation
nodes.description: Animated GIF demonstrating the branch list UI of the dragit app. Shows a dark-themed panel listing four local git branches: hotfix-1, hotfix-2, hotfix-3, and main. Each branch card displays the branch name with a git icon, tracking remote (e.g. origin/hotfix-1), and last-modified timestamp. The 'main' branch is highlighted with a pink/red border indicating it is the current branch, and has a filled arrow icon next to it. A cursor hand is hovering over the hotfix-2 card, suggesting a delete or interaction gesture is about to occur. The animation likely demonstrates the branch delete feature of the dragit UI.
